title: Host Hotels & Resorts: Cheap And Well Positioned
text: Host Hotels has fallen 5% year-to-date and nearly 20% over the past year. While recent operating performance has been strong as leisure tourism has rebounded sharply post-pandemic, 2023 results are expected to decline as expenses increase in an uncertain revenue environment.

title: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces First Quarter 2023 Earnings Call to be Held on May 4, 2023
text: BETHESDA, Md., March 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”) will report first quarter 2023 financial results on Wednesday, May 3, 2023, after the market close.

title: Lodging REITs: Valuations Already Reflect Improvements
text: We sold the entirety of our lodging exposure during March of 2020 (going from ~5% in early 2020 to 0% by the end of March). Pent-up leisure demand surprised most observers, resulting in a rapid recovery that began in late 2021 and was arguably the most powerful turnaround in history.

title: CosmoLex Becomes Exclusive Preferred Practice Management Software Partner of the Canadian Bar Association
text: MONMOUTH JUNCTION, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CosmoLex, a leading practice management software provider for the legal industry, today announced its partnership with the Canadian Bar Association (CBA) as the professional society’s exclusive preferred supplier of legal practice management software. CosmoLex is a fully integrated system designed to handle every aspect of practice management for modern law firms. The end-to-end solution is built to comply with Canadian accounting laws and is the fastest-growing cloud-based legal software in Canada. As part of the collaboration, CosmoLex will offer an exclusive discount to CBA members. “CosmoLex operates under a singular mandate to take care of law practices so they can take better care of their clients,” said Ajay Khatri, general manager of CosmoLex. “With thousands of satisfied users in Canada, we are proud to partner with such an esteemed organization to help Canadian law firms thrive in today’s digital environment.” With a focus on Canadian legal practice, CosmoLex offers helpful features and benefits specialized for Canadian firms, including: Data centers located in Canada so data stays in Canada Library of Law Society compliance reporting SOC 2 Type 2 compliance, with voluntary security certification Province-specific features and configurations, such as: Transaction levy tracking Form 9A generation Trust administration fee (TAF) tracking Law Society trust compliance uploads HST/PST/GST reporting Conveyancing integrations Transaction levy tracking Form 9A generation Trust administration fee (TAF) tracking Law Society trust compliance uploads HST/PST/GST reporting Conveyancing integrations Additionally, CosmoLex streamlines and simplifies the daily duties of practice management, including billing, trust and business accounting, payment processing, time and expense tracking, calendaring, tasks, e-signature, email and document management, and boasts a state-of-the art CRM and client portal as well. To learn more about the benefits of CosmoLex software, visit cosmolex.ca. About CosmoLex CosmoLex is the one fully integrated solution that lets solo attorneys and small law firms manage their practice, billing, and accounting with one login. Law firms running on CosmoLex can eliminate the need to maintain multiple programs because CosmoLex does it all – time and expense tracking, billing, business accounting, trust (IOLTA) accounting, calendaring, task, email and document management, and even a CRM – in one web-based application. The built-in client portal provides streamlined and secure client communications. And CosmoLexPay increases the ease and speed of receiving payments through compliant credit card processing. CosmoLex takes care of the entire legal practice, so lawyers can take better care of their clients. About The Canadian Bar Association The CBA is dedicated to supporting the profession, the rule of law and improvement in the law and the administration of justice. Some 37,000 lawyers, judges, Quebec notaries, law professors and law students from across Canada are members.
